commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a centralized Control UI dashboard keyboard-shortcut dispatcher, localizes and exposes the New messages shortcut, updates focused UI tests, adds a changelog entry, and formats an installer docs table.

PR surface: Source +409, Tests +122, Docs +1. Total +532 across 47 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR implements a new Control UI shortcut capability. Source comparison still gives high-confidence gap evidence because current main has only the existing command-palette shortcut and click-only New messages affordance.

target.title: fix(control-ui): add guarded dashboard shortcuts
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds a centralized guarded Control UI dashboard shortcut dispatcher for `/`, `N`, `Esc`, and the existing Cmd/Ctrl+K palette shortcut.
- Reuses existing app actions: `/` switches to Chat and focuses the composer, `N` calls the same New messages scroll path, and `Esc` dismisses transient dashboard UI in a defined priority order.
- Keeps dashboard shortcuts out of inputs, textareas, selects, contenteditable regions, role=textbox controls, and common embedded editor roots.
- Adds visible `N` discoverability on the New messages affordance and focused regression coverage for dispatch, editable no-ops, and the click path.

Fixes #81946.
Refs closed prior implementation attempt #81958.

## Duplicate / related work review
- Current `origin/main` still only has the Cmd/Ctrl+K palette handler and click-only New messages button, so #81946 is not resolved on main.
- GitHub timeline and search found #81958 as the concrete tied PR. It implemented the same issue, passed ClawSweeper/CI, then was closed stale unmerged on 2026-05-16.
- `gitcrawl` was stale for #81946 and had no embedding for the new issue, so live `gh` was used for current issue/PR truth.
- `prtags` is installed and authenticated as BunsDev, but `prtags search text` and `prtags group list` both timed out against `https://prtags.dutiful.dev`, so duplicate tagging could not be written safely in this pass.

## Bug / security review
- UI-only keyboard handling and tests; no dependency, workflow, server, auth, secret, network, filesystem, or permission changes.
- The shortcut guard is centralized in `ui/src/ui/app-keyboard-shortcuts.ts` so dashboard shortcuts do not get scattered across components.
- Security-sensitive review point was key interception: global shortcuts now bail out for editable targets, including contenteditable and embedded editor roots, before dispatching printable dashboard shortcuts.
- `N` only fires on the Chat tab when the New messages affordance is active and no manual refresh is in flight, avoiding page-level/native scroll hijacking.
- `Esc` dismissal is explicit and bounded to existing transient UI state; it does not execute user-controlled strings or invoke navigation outside existing app methods.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Control UI dashboard shortcuts now support `/` composer focus, `N` new-message jump, and `Esc` transient dismissal through a guarded dispatcher while preserving editable-field and composer-local behavior.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw Codex worktree on Node/pnpm plus Blacksmith Testbox Linux validation for the rebased branch.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/navigation.browser.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 CHANGELOG.md ui/src/styles/chat/layout.css ui/src/ui/app-keyboard-shortcuts.ts ui/src/ui/app.ts ui/src/ui/navigation.browser.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --blacksmith-org openclaw --blacksmith-workflow .github/workflows/ci-check-testbox.yml --blacksmith-job check --blacksmith-ref main --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- "env CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 OPENCLAW_TEST_PROJECTS_PARALLEL=6 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=900000 pnpm check:changed"`

Evidence after fix:
- Focused UI tests passed: 2 files, 57 tests.
- Formatting check passed on all touched files.
- UI test typecheck passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed.
- Testbox changed-file gate passed on `tbx_01ks4gfpat2r553qp4fxpxwbhx`, exit 0, command time 1m57s.

Observed result after fix: Regression tests cover `/` switching to Chat and focusing the composer, `N` calling `scrollToBottom()` only when the new-message state is active, editable targets no-oping for dashboard shortcuts, `Esc` dismissing transient state, and the New messages button retaining its click path while exposing the `N` shortcut.

What was not tested: No manual browser smoke was run after this patch; coverage is automated Control UI browser/unit tests plus Testbox changed gates.
